issues.criterion: Bundle completeness — README vs actual pages on disk
issues.details: README.md claims '14 Full captures (HTML + desktop + mobile screenshots): 14' and lists pages/nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker/ in the 'Pages Captured (full)' section, but that directory does NOT exist in the bundle. Only 13 of 14 manifest pages have corresponding bundle entries.
issues.remediation: Either re-crawl and capture the missing page (https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker) into the bundle, or update README to accurately reflect it as a partial/metadata-only capture. The page is httpStatus:200 and publicly accessible (verified via Playwright — text_length=12719, title confirmed).

issues.details: manifest.json navigation.header has 27 links but only 14 unique hrefs. The nav links appear twice because the site's header HTML contains both a desktop and mobile menu. This is expected behaviour for this site, but downstream agents should de-duplicate before generating nav blocks.
issues.remediation: De-duplicate header.links.json on href when building the EDS nav block. The 14 unique links are correct and sufficient.

evidence.finding: Manifest contains 14 pages (meets ≥10 requirement). All URLs use https://www.juvederm.nl (www prefix). 7 archetypes: homepage(2), treatment-page(5), faq(1), clinic-finder(3), legal(1), contact(1), informational(1). No infinite clinic-finder URL patterns detected (3 clinic pages, all short paths).

Sitemap has 13 URLs. Manifest has 14. Extra page (nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker) was discovered via footer link — NOT a crawl truncation. Manifest covers all 13 sitemap URLs plus the late-discovered page.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + body.innerText stable, dismissed OneTrust overlays, viewport 1440x900 (desktop) / 390x844 (mobile)
evidence.finding: Live page renders correctly. Title confirmed 'JUVÉDERM Nederlands'. Body text length 7152 chars (live). Bundle HTML 388KB with matching content (keywords: lippen, JUVÉDERM, behandeling all present). No pre-hydration issue. Bundle desktop.png 1440x10466 full-page PNG (2.1MB, non-empty). Bundle mobile.png 390x12057 (940KB, non-empty).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + body.innerText stable, dismissed OneTrust overlays, viewport 1440x900 (desktop) / 390x844 (mobile)
evidence.finding: Live page renders correctly. Title confirmed 'Juvederm en lippen | Juvéderm® Netherlands'. Bundle HTML 347KB with matching Dutch content (lippen, hyaluronzuur, behandeling). Bundle desktop.png 1440x7027 (2.4MB). Bundle mobile.png 390x7180 (1MB).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + body.innerText stable, dismissed OneTrust overlays, viewport 1440x900 (desktop) / 390x844 (mobile)
evidence.finding: Live FAQ page renders with substantial content. main.innerText=20604 chars (rich content, no pre-hydration issue). Bundle HTML 343KB. Bundle desktop.png 1440x18883 (2MB full-page). Bundle mobile.png 390x21661 (1.3MB).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + body.innerText stable, viewport 1440x900 (desktop) / 390x844 (mobile)
evidence.finding: Page is live and accessible (text_length=12719, title='General Terms and Conditions Clinic Finder | Juvéderm® Netherlands', httpStatus=200). Has full metadata in manifest.json. MISSING from source-bundle/pages/ directory despite README claiming capture. Meets orchestrator minimum requirement (metadata present in manifest).

header.html is 40KB with real navigation elements. footer.html is 55KB with real elements. header.links.json has 27 links (14 unique hrefs — duplication from desktop+mobile menus, see issues). footer.links.json has 21 links (all distinct, including social media, legal, and nav links). header-desktop.png is 1440x150 (205KB). footer-desktop.png exists (53KB). Chrome is non-empty and correctly captured.

README documents: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle wait, 15+ overlay selectors (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Abbvie banner), content stability loop polling main.innerText every 500ms requiring 2 identical readings (up to 12s), Escape fallback, desktop 1440x900, mobile 390x844. Strategy is complete and reproducible.

summary: PASS — 14 pages in manifest (all www.juvederm.nl), 13/14 fully captured in bundle with valid screenshots at 1440x900 and 390x844; late-discovered page (algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker) has manifest metadata meeting minimum requirement but is missing from bundle despite README claiming full capture (medium issue); chrome header/footer captured correctly with 27/21 links; no infinite clinic-finder URLs; render strategy documented; all 3 spot-checked live pages confirm correct content.
